response.justification: Wei Chen has strong backend and distributed systems experience, including real-time systems (Dunnhumby) and event-driven architectures (GISCollective), but lacks direct fintech, agentic AI, or regulated environment experience. Leadership scale (10->30+) is unclear; recent roles are individual contributor-heavy. AI-agent infrastructure exposure (re:cinq) is promising but not production-grade or fintech-specific.
strengths: Proven expertise in event-driven systems and real-time data processing (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Demonstrated leadership in open-source and community-driven projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong backend fundamentals (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang, distributed systems)
concerns: No direct experience with fintech infrastructure, credit systems, or regulated environments
Limited senior leadership scale-up experience (teams >10) or hybrid outsourcing governance
AI-agent exposure is recent and prototype-focused (MCP, developer tooling), not production-grade agentic systems
